label: Expansion review with selective transcript loading

payloads.label: Agenda
payloads.text: Review expansion timeline and confirm the next executive checkpoint.

payloads.label: Summary
payloads.text: Customer agreed that procurement can start next week if the commercial note stays inside the reviewed package and no delivery promise is added early.

label: Delivery promise risk still needs explicit boundary handling

payloads.label: Summary
payloads.text: The customer asked for a launch date, and the team discussed several delivery windows without final approval.

payloads.label: Decisions
payloads.text: No formal delivery date was approved, and any date discussion must stay non-commitment until contract review.

facts.content: No formal delivery date was approved.

riskFlags.reason: Delivery date discussion could be misunderstood as commitment.

recommendedNextAction: Review the delivery-date boundary note with legal and send only a non-commitment follow-up.
blockers: Delivery date request must stay boundary-noted until contract review.

label: Blocker needs operator review before silent promotion

payloads.label: Agenda
payloads.text: Clarify security blocker and align the pilot owner.

payloads.label: Summary
payloads.text: A security questionnaire blocks procurement, but only one of the sub-points has a confirmed owner.

facts.content: Only one sub-point has a confirmed owner.

recommendedNextAction: Assign the security questionnaire owner and confirm the missing sub-point evidence.
